content: Proofpoint is saying your IP is blocked. I encourage following their links to identify how to unblock this. or work with your email provider. Thunderbird sends mail from your IP address, but Thunderbird cannot change it.
creator: davidsk

content: How do I follow Proofpoints links to identify how to unblock the email? Thunderbird is my email provider. Thank you.
creator: accounts66

content: NO. Thunderbird is only your email client, your assistant. Your email provider is the one who authorizes the account, the password, the storage for messages. This is often the name to the right of the @ sign in an email address, but not always. It is NEVER thunderbirdd.
creator: davidsk

content:
Try clicking on View -> Headers -> Normal.

Looks like your emails are set to show all available headers.
